intro: Araeoandra tenuicaulis, commonly known as the "thin-stemmed Araeoandra," is a species of climbing plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and infections. The bioactive constituents of Araeoandra tenuicaulis include alkaloids, such as tenuicauline and tenuibine, as well as other compounds with potential medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Araeoandra tenuicaulis is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
